channel.title: tiimgreen/github-cheat-sheet Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: tiimgreen/github-cheat-sheet Jan 27th - Feb 2nd, 2020
item.description:
GitHub

Keyboard Shortcuts

  • Pressing s will focus the search field for the current repository. Pressing ↓ to select the “All GitHub” option changes the field to search all of GitHub.

item.title: tiimgreen/github-cheat-sheet Sep 5th - Sep 11th, 2016
item.description:
GitHub

Keyboard Shortcuts

  • Pressing y when looking at a file (e.g., https://github.com/tiimgreen/github-cheat-sheet/blob/master/README.md) will change your URL to one which, in effect, freezes the page you are looking at. If this code changes, you will still be able to see what you saw at that current time.

    • Git

    Git Grep

  • -e The next parameter is the pattern (e.g., regex)

item.title: tiimgreen/github-cheat-sheet Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2016
item.description:
Git

Empty Commits

  • The first commit of a repository: git commit -m "Initial commit" --allow-empty.

item.title: tiimgreen/github-cheat-sheet Apr 28th - May 4th, 2014
item.description:
GitHub

Task Lists in Markdown Documents

  • Venus
  • Mercury
  • Earth
    • Moon
  • Mars
    • Deimos
    • Phobos

item.title: tiimgreen/github-cheat-sheet Apr 14th - Apr 20th, 2014
item.description:
Git

Stripspace

  • Strips trailing whitespace
  • Collapses newlines
  • Adds newline to end of file

    • Git

    Empty Commits

  • Annotating the start of a new bulk of work or a new feature.
  • Documenting when you make changes to the project that aren't code related.
  • Communicating with people using your repository.

    • GitHub

    Keyboard Shortcuts

  • Pressing t will bring up a file explorer.
  • Pressing w will bring up the branch selector.
  • Pressing l will edit labels on existing Issues.
